yesterdayAnalysis: Solid 4.1mi run at HR 142 generating 40 TSS — appropriately controlled effort for race week minus 7 days. Pace and heart rate suggest good aerobic fitness without overextension. This run fits perfectly into the taper protocol, maintaining sharpness while protecting the hip.
todayRecommendation: Execute today's planned 1,500m pool swim with 4x50 at race pace as scheduled. Keep the main set easy, use the race-pace pickups just to remind your body what T-pace feels like. This is about confidence and feel, not fitness gain.
weekProgress: Week 13 of 13 shows 20 TSS of 150 target (13%) with 6 days remaining including today. This is exactly on-track for race week's back-loaded structure — short sharpening sessions early week (Mon-Wed), then travel Thu, bike check Fri, briefing Sat, and race Sun. No sessions missed, taper progressing as designed.
keyInsight: You're 6 days out from Oregon 70.3 with excellent sleep recovery (83 score last night, 8.2h), controlled training load in the taper window, and a proven conservative bike strategy from Oceanside — stay the course and trust the 13-week build.
positives: Sleep quality rebounded to 83 score with 8.2h duration and strong REM (133min) after mid-week dip
